Meta Rebelz Core Team

META REBELZ

0% minted 0/ 5000
FREE PUBLIC MINT!
Price: Free + Gas

Go to OpenSea.io and connect your wallet to view your nft

A collection of 5,000 Meta Rebelz NFTs — Digital collectibles living on the Ethereum blockchain. Your Rebel is your membership, and grants access to members-only benefits, one of which is access to the alley, the Rebelz metaverse. Future perks will be available to the community as we journey through the roadmap.

The MetaRebelz

Meta Rebelz Founded by David Taylor and Robert Lail. Robert a talented Graphic Artist which comes from a web and logo design background. David Taylor a Entrepreneur with a background in Aerospace and Real Estate. Both have come together in the Web 3 space to propel it forward. As a whole we aim to bring everyone together regardless of gender, ethnicity, religion, ideology or community.

Find us On Discord

5,000

Total Items in Collection

Holding a REBEL will allow you access to the Alley, Rewards, IRL Events, Staking and other members-only benefits.

RoadMap

Phase 01

REBELZ LAUNCH

SOCIAL MEDIA AND WEBSITE LAUNCHED

SPECIAL ROLES WITHIN THE COMMUNITY WITH ALLOWLIST BENEFITS

THE COLLECTION OF 8,500 METAREBELZ WILL MINT ON OUR WEBSITE

Phase 02

REBELZ REWARDS

OUT OF THE 5000 COLLECTION 150 WILL BE AIRDROPPED A PRE-DETERMINED MATCHING DYNAMIC VERSION

2 MINTERS THAT MINT THE RARE 1/1 WILL EACH RECEIVE A DYNAMIC VERSION 1/1 NFT

4 RANDOM NFT HOLDERS WILL BE DRAWN TO EACH RECIEVE A A DYNAMIC VERSION NFT

Phase 03

REBELZ ACTIVATION

COMMUNITY WALLET WILL BE ACTIVATED

ACTIVATE THE CHARITY WALLET (MR WILL BE BOOTS ON THE GROUND GIVING BACK)

FIRST IRL MEET UP (MUST BE A HOLDER TO ATTEND)

Phase 04

ALLEY CONSTRUCTION

THE REBELZ ALLEY CONSTRUCTION BEGINS

MERCHANDISE WILL BE READY FOR THE META REBELZ COMMUNITY

BRAND PARTNERSHIP TO BE ANNOUNCED

Phase 05

REBELZ STAKING

STAKING MECHANISM ADDED TO OUR ECOSYSTEM

STAKING REWARDS WILL BE DEPLOYED IN AIRDROPS

2ND REBELZ TRACK RELEASED

Phase 06

WEB 2 AIRDROPS

AIRDROPS TO HOLDERS WILL COMMENCE FROM WEB 2 PARTNERSHIPS

3RD IRL EVENT WILL BE ANNOUNCED

WEB 2 BRANDING MERCHANDISE WILL BE ANNOUNCED

Phase 07

ALLEY COMPLETE

THE ALLEY CONSTRUCTION COMPLETED

NUMEROUS ROOMS IN THE ALLEY WILL BE OPENED ACCESS BASED ON TRIAT

A SPECIFIC TRAIT WILL BE ABLE TO ACCESS ALL ROOMS

Phase 08

ROADMAP 2.0

REBELZ ROADMAP 2.0

ROADMAP 2.0 WILL BE RELEASED WITH ADDITIONAL PARTNERSHIPS
